case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK, VS. MEGAN H. WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK, SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MEGAN H. AKA MEGAN HALE WILLIAMS $17,732.99 PRINCIPAL, $473.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,206.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100184156)

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100175066): TSAI, KIMBERLEE RAE SUBSTITUTED FOR MIKHALEVICH, MARIANNA AS ATTORNEY FOR AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK, SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $473.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100184156) AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MEGAN H. AKA MEGAN HALE WILLIAMS

AKA MEGAN HALE WILLIAMS DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-18-2022
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210006108) AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MEGAN H. AKA MEGAN HALE WILLIAMS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200046493), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK, SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED DEC-19-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MEGAN H. AKA MEGAN HALE WILLIAMS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100184156) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
